// 01

About

I'm pursuing a B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at Dr. N.G.P Institute of Technology, Coimbatore, with a CGPA of 8.00.

My foundation is in Java, SQL and Python, but most of my hands-on work lives in the MERN stack — building responsive, real-time applications where the frontend, backend and database all talk to each other cleanly. I'm especially drawn to projects where AI can be layered onto a practical, everyday problem: parking, hiring, farming, events.

Outside coursework, I've interned in full-stack development, completed a data analytics virtual internship with Deloitte, and competed in two hackathons. I'm looking for my first full-time role as a software developer where I can keep learning and contribute from day one.

Projects

01
Smart Parking Booking System

A full-stack web app that helps users find and reserve parking spaces in real time, with dynamic slot availability, a responsive booking UI, and MongoDB-backed storage that cut down search time.

React.jsNode.jsMongoDBCSS
02
Resume Match AI System

An AI-powered platform connecting job seekers and HR professionals — analyzing resumes to surface missing keywords and skill gaps, generating a job-description match percentage, and suggesting relevant certifications to close the gap.

React.jsAI APIsNode.js
03
Event Management Application

A web-based platform for managing events, registrations and participant details, with dynamic event listings and an intuitive registration flow that digitized a previously manual process.

HTMLCSSReact
04
Agro Smart — Integrated Cooperative Farming System

A full-stack platform connecting farmers, laborers, buyers and equipment renters in one digital ecosystem, with role-based dashboards and an AI-based fertilizer recommendation engine driven by live weather data.

React.jsNode.jsMongoDBPython (AI/ML)OpenWeatherMap API
